name: uhd-host
title: uhd-host
summary: universal hardware driver for Ettus Research products - host apps
description:
universal hardware driver for Ettus Research products - host apps
Host utilities for the Universal Hardware Driver for Ettus Research products.
.
The supported devices provide analog radio receiver and transmitter hardware
along with digital interfaces for getting signals to and from a software
defined radio running on the host computer.
.
This package includes the uhd_find_devices application to locate and
configure attached peripherals, the uhd_usrp_probe application to
display hardware configuration information and Doxygen generated
documentation.

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use rfnoc_image_builder because universal hardware driver for Ettus Research products - host apps.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use rfnoc_image_builder as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `rfnoc_image_builder  [-h]  (-y  YAML_CONFIG  |  -r GRC_CONFIG) [-C BASE_DIR] [-F FPGA_DIR] [-B` as documented upstream for rfnoc_image_builder.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair rfnoc_image_builder with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `rfnoc_image_builder --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.

documentation.readme: rfnoc_image_builder - Build UHD image using RFNoC blocks. USAGE rfnoc_image_builder [-h] (-y YAML_CONFIG | -r GRC_CONFIG) [-C BASE_DIR] [-F FPGA_DIR] [-B BUILD_DIR] [-O BUILD_OUTPUT_DIR] [-E BUILD_IP_DIR] [-o IMAGE_CORE_OUTPUT] [-I INCLUDE_DIR] [-b GRC_BLOCKS] [-l LOG_LEVEL] [-R] [-G] [-W] [-S SECURE_CORE] [-K SECURE_KEY] [-d DEVICE] [-n IM- AGE_CORE_NAME] [-t TARGET] [-g] [-Y] [--CHECK] [-s] [-P] [-j JOBS] [-c] [-p VIVADO_PATH] [-H] [-D] [--color {never,auto,always}] optional arguments: -h, --help show a help message and exit -y YAML_CONFIG, --yaml-config YAML_CONFIG Path to YAML configuration file (image core file). Either this option or --grc-config is required. -r GRC_CONFIG, --grc-confi
documentation.how_to_use: Install/setup: sudo apt install uhd. Run the primary entrypoint as shown in upstream docs, e.g. `rfnoc_image_builder  [-h]  (-y  YAML_CONFIG  |  -r GRC_CONFIG) [-C BASE_DIR] [-F FPGA_DIR] [-B`. universal hardware driver for Ettus Research products - host apps.
documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'install' phase against surfaces [local] in the Kali Linux category. Fits when the engagement needs: universal hardware driver for Ettus Research products - host apps.
documentation.why_to_use: Prefer this tool based on upstream description: rfnoc_image_builder - Build UHD image using RFNoC blocks. USAGE rfnoc_image_builder [-h] (-y YAML_CONFIG | -r GRC_CONFIG) [-C BASE_DIR] [-F FPGA_DIR] [-B BUILD_DIR] [-O BUILD_OUTPUT_DIR] [-E BUILD_IP_DIR] [-o IMAGE_CORE_OUTPUT] [-I INCLUDE_DIR] [-b GRC_BLOCKS] [-l LOG_LEVEL] [-R] [-G] [-W] [-S SECURE_CORE] [-K SECURE_KEY] [-d DEVICE] [-n IM- AGE_CORE_NAME] [-t TARGET] [-g] [-Y] [--CHECK] [-s] [-P].
usage_sections: Install with: sudo apt install uhd
